title: Shattering Glass!
lines: CRASH! The front window shatters into a thousand crystalline teeth as several pale, grey-skinned figures burst through the grime, their movements a horrifying, jerky fusion of the human and the insectile.

They scramble over the splintered counter with a fluid, liquid speed, their fingers elongated into translucent, chitinous claws that scrape against the metal. Their eyes are milky cataracts, reflecting an absolute void where humanity once resided.
The air is filled with their wet, rhythmic hissing. Your only hope of survival is the narrow, rotting staircase that ascends into the lightless gloom of the storage loft!

options.desc: 1. Scramble up the rotting stairs toward the attic
2. Duck into the suffocating shadows behind the heavy counter
3. Attempt to heave a rusted shelf against the stairwell
